evals.prompt: Run a full Auth0 tenant health check for my tenant. I'm on the Free plan and building a B2C SaaS app — about 2,000 MAU today and growing 15% per month.
evals.expected_output: Plan-aware health check producing two scores (Security & Config Hygiene + Capability Fit), a plan recommendation with exact cost, and an optional remediation pass. Report saved as markdown, HTML, and PDF.
expectations: Invokes the auth0-checkmate sister skill (or uses an existing report) for tenant scan + company context
Waits for auth0-checkmate Phase 3 to complete before starting Phase 2 use-case classification
Classifies tenant as B2C use case
Computes a Security & Config Hygiene score from CheckMate summary[]
Computes a Capability Fit score based on use-case feature gaps
Computes a4aa_fit_score per data-integrity-rules.md before the A4AA gate
Runs enterprise-need detection before plan matching
Produces a plan recommendation with exact monthly/annual cost from pricing.md
Does not recommend Enterprise if self-service plans cover the use case
Saves report to ~/.auth0-checkmate/state/ (shared state dir with auth0-checkmate)

evals.prompt: Check my Auth0 tenant health. We use Organizations and need SAML enterprise connections for our B2B product.
evals.expected_output: Health check classifying tenant as B2B, detecting enterprise-grade needs, and recommending an appropriate plan or Enterprise path.
expectations: Classifies tenant as B2B use case
Detects SAML enterprise connections as an enterprise-grade feature signal
Runs enterprise-need detection and correctly routes to Enterprise or B2B Professional
If recommending Enterprise, emits the Talk-to-Sales block with no price
Capability Fit score reflects SAML and Organizations gaps or confirmations
